pull.title: Complex tanh (and thus tan) accuracy refinement
pull.body:
## Update the complex tanh function to avoid numerical issues.

The current complex tanh function has problems with both accuracy and over/underflow
This new version fixes these accuracy issues while giving a speedup.

## Perf
Testing on H100 we see decent speedup. 
Using the math-teams standard math_bench test we have the following (Similar results on a 5080):

**Operations/SM/cycle:**
`ctanh():`
| H100 |  old | new | new/old |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| fp64 | 0.2163 | 0.3565 | 1.65 | 
| fp32 | 0.6407 | 0.8284 | 1.29 |

## Correctness
The current version has several intervals where accuracy gets lost.
Apart from the usual over/underflow suspects, there are also some intervals where catastrophic cancellation causes accuracy loss.

This new version fixes these and testing gives the following:
### GPU Correctness
For the new version, an intensive bracket and bisect search, along with testing special hard values, gives:
```
GPU fp64:
Max ulp real error (8.316,3.366) @ (7.270392412e-15,1.507304668)        (0x3d005f188b8eb261,0x3ff81deb7fd12fae)                       
        Ours = (1.805960114e-12,15.72893075)    Ref = (1.805960114e-12,15.72893075)                                                   
        Ours = (0x3d7fc55240728a71,0x402f753669549df9)               Ref = (0x3d7fc55240728a69,0x402f753669549df6)                    
                                                                                                                                      
Max ulp imag error (2.948,5.811) @ (3.333738963e-05,-2.171464686e+77)   (0x3f017a77fc5190dc,0xcffe0148bb9741c2) 
        Ours = (6.580654335e-05,0.9868921372)    Ref = (6.580654335e-05,0.9868921372)                                                 
        Ours = (0x3f114033ce64fb7a,0x3fef949ed1bfde0f)               Ref = (0x3f114033ce64fb7d,0x3fef949ed1bfde15)
```

```
GPU fp32:
Max ulp real error (8.016,3.672) @ (-3.960616141e-06,1.310337782)       (0xb684e56f,0x3fa7b926)
        Ours = (-5.97211656e-05,3.752166986)    Ref = (-5.97211947e-05,3.75216794)                                                    
        Ours = (0xb87a7d1d,0x40702381)               Ref = (0xb87a7d25,0x40702385)                                                    
                                                                                                                                      
Max ulp imag error (0.8914,5.721) @ (-3.473282576,2.940004844e+34)      (0xc05e4a43,0x78b53119)                 
        Ours = (-1.000158906,0.001917456975)    Ref = (-1.000158787,0.001917456277)    
        Ours = (0xbf800535,0x3afb532e)               Ref = (0xbf800534,0x3afb5328) 
```

### CPU Correctness
```
CPU fp64:
Max ulp real error (6.902,3.774) @ (7.979126863e-06,1.830677559)        (0x3ee0bbc2d87c7800,0x3ffd4a748d384c00)
        Ours = (0.0001208383555,-3.760891926)    Ref = (0.0001208383555,-3.760891926)          
        Ours = (0x3f1fad5323efb6fd,0xc00e164e8194b79d)               Ref = (0x3f1fad5323efb704,0xc00e164e8194b7a1)
                                                                                                                                      
Max ulp imag error (2.924,5.354) @ (7.979126851e-06,1.83067756) (0x3ee0bbc2d80da400,0x3ffd4a748da45a00)
        Ours = (0.0001208383539,-3.760891902)    Ref = (0.0001208383539,-3.760891902)  
        Ours = (0x3f1fad531cd4ca44,0xc00e164e7e6282af)               Ref = (0x3f1fad531cd4ca47,0xc00e164e7e6282b4)   
```

```
CPU fp32:
Max ulp real error (6.136,2.442) @ (-0.03077560104,-1.829890966)        (0xbcfc1d1d,0xbfea39de)
        Ours = (-0.4624662101,3.719158411)    Ref = (-0.4624663889,3.719158888)                                                       
        Ours = (0xbeecc85f,0x406e06b1)               Ref = (0xbeecc865,0x406e06b3)                                                    
                                                                                                                                      
Max ulp imag error (1.907,5.369) @ (0.004123169463,1.157435281e+13)     (0x3b871ba7,0x55286dd3)                 
        Ours = (0.008117808029,0.9842792749)    Ref = (0.008117809892,0.984279573)     
        Ours = (0x3c05008e,0x3f7bf9ba)               Ref = (0x3c050090,0x3f7bf9bf)  
```
